aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured conversational content and authority signals, despite having a solid local presence.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with detailed answers to common plumbing queries.
Add HowTo schema for common plumbing tasks or repairs.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks Q&A engagement and regular posts.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed business info

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured conversational content and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency plumbing services and DIY troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with answers to common plumbing questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed case studies on the website.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to cite their expertise.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will optimize your site with structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground daily.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Your Path to Plumbing Authority
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your expertise visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
